characterdesc-farmer:
Some folk break the earth for ore. You break it for bread.

Farmers reap far more from their crops, and a lifetime of hauling heavy loads means armor barely slows or starves them. They are poor fighters though, and have no love for the dark of the mines.
traitdesc-farmer: Harvests extra produce from planted crops
traitdesc-burdened: Used to carrying heavy loads all day: armor's movement penalty is greatly reduced, and its hunger cost is cut down to light-armor levels
traitdesc-gentlehands: More used to the hoe than the blade: deals less damage in melee
charattribute-produceDropRate-0.25: +25% extra produce when harvesting planted crops
charattribute-armorWalkSpeedAffectedness: -35% armor walk speed penalty, -40% armor hunger penalty
